title: Disallow duplicate issue titles on create
description: Prevent tskr create from creating duplicate issues when the title already exists.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Clarified: reject duplicate titles within the target scope only (shared vs local); comparison is case-insensitive; duplicates are never allowed.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting implementation for explicit success output on update/close/delete plus update no-op and duplicate-title checks (shared scope, case-insensitive).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented Gherkin + steps + code changes for explicit success output on update/close/delete, update no-op error, and duplicate-title rejection on update (case-insensitive, shared scope). Pending tests.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: - Creating an issue with a title that already exists is rejected and no new issue is written. - Error message clearly states duplicate title and existing issue id. - Behavior enforced in both Python and Rust and covered by shared Gherkin scenarios.
